item.title: This CapCut template features @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur in a super kawaii anime style dancing to Nervy Funk by BRTS7, DJ KVNXD, and Dj Zidzz, turning chaotic brainrot into a surprisingly cute, aesthetic vibe. The track, release
item.description: By @.memescreens: This CapCut template features @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur in a super kawaii anime style dancing to Nervy Funk by BRTS7, DJ KVNXD, and Dj Zidzz, turning chaotic brainrot into a surprisingly cute, aesthetic vibe. The track, release
